news.t: How To Invest In Ukraine: Top Ukrainian Stocks On Global Markets
3 ETFs to Invest Globally in Q2 2021

holdings.infoBox: VSS is an equity ETF with a total of 4867 individual holdings. The top holdings are Slbbh1142 stock at 5.91%, Yuan Renminbi at 1.87%, Mktliq 12/31/2049 at 0.41%, Taiwan Union Technology at 0.33%, and Hudbay Minerals at 0.28%.

overview.description: The Vanguard FTSE All-World ex-US Small-Cap ETF (VSS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE Global Small Cap x US index, a market-cap-weighted index of global non-US small-cap stocks. VSS was launched on Apr 2, 2009 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: FTSE Global Small Cap x US

data.title: How To Invest In Ukraine: Top Ukrainian Stocks On Global Markets
data.text: Companies like Airbnb have stepped up by offering shelter for 100,000 Ukrainians who needed refuge. The Russian invasion has affected markets around the globe, leading to market volatility.

data.title: 3 ETFs to Invest Globally in Q2 2021
data.text: The 3 ETFs to invest globally in Q2 2021 are VSS, ACWI, and VEU
